name: Abnormal Security
description: Monitor Abnormal Security AI-powered email security for threat detection and compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Abnormal Security at https://app.abnormalsecurity.com
2. Go to Settings → Integrations → API
3. Generate an API token
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Abnormal Security Portal → Settings → Integrations → API
